description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.7 Docker image. Define stages lint, test, build, deploy, and release and a hidden .code rule that runs only when changes occur in src/**, tests/**, pyproject.toml, pylintrc, pytest.ini, or tox.ini. In the lint stage add lint:flake8, lint:pylint, and lint:radon jobs that extend .code and execute respectively 'tox -e flake8', 'tox -e pylint', and 'tox -e radon'. In the test stage add test:python310 (python:3.10, allow_failure true), test:python36 (python:3.6), test:python37 (default python:3.7), test:python38 (python:3.8), and test:python39 (python:3.9) jobs, each extending .code, retry once, running 'tox -e py310', 'tox -e py36', 'tox -e py37', 'tox -e py38', 'tox -e py39' respectively, and for 310, 38, and 39 also running 'codecov --token=$COVERAGE_TOKEN'. Include a before_script that installs libxml2-dev and libxslt-dev via apt and installs poetry, tox, and codecov via pip. In the build stage add a build:package job that runs 'tox -e build' and stores the dist directory as an artifact that expires in 1 week. In the deploy stage add a pages job that installs mkdocs and mkdocs-cinder via pip, runs 'mkdocs build -d public/', publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and runs only on the main branch. In the release stage add a release:pypi job that runs 'poetry publish -u $PYPI_USERNAME -p $PYPI_PASSWORD' and runs only on tags.
